title: Funeral for Iran’s late Supreme Leader Khamenei to begin July 4, burial set for July 9

snapshot.title: Funeral for Iran’s late Supreme Leader Khamenei to begin July 4, burial set for July 9
snapshot.description: DUBAI: The ‌funeral for Iran’s late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei will begin in Tehran on July 4 and conclude with his burial in his hometown, the northeastern holy city of Mashhad, on July 9, state media reported on Saturday. Khamenei was killed on the first day of Israeli and US airstrikes against Iran on February 28. The 86-year-old cleric had been at the helm of
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Funeral for Iran’s late Supreme Leader Khamenei to begin July 4, burial set for July 9 | Arab News
